stories.title: Alabama Is the New No. 1 — Softball America Crowns New Top Team After Texas Upset (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Alabama is No. 1.

Softball America's Week 10 poll has the Crimson Tide on top for the first time in 2026. NFCA Coaches Poll drops this morning at 10 AM ET.

Texas held No. 1 all season. Not anymore. #RollTide #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Week 10 poll shakeup:

1. Alabama
2. Texas Tech
3. Oklahoma
4. Texas (was No. 1)
5. Nebraska

The Crimson Tide beat No. 1 Texas in a series. The rankings caught up. #SECSoftball #CFASoftball

article.headline: Alabama Claims No. 1 in Softball America's Week 10 Poll — The Throne Finally Changes Hands

stories.title: Red River Rivalry — Three Days Away, Stakes Have Never Been Higher (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Three days.

Texas (32-4) vs. No. 3 Oklahoma (38-3). McCombs Field. April 10-12. ESPN2/ESPN.

Texas needs a response after losing the Alabama series. Oklahoma arrives with Kendall Wells at 30 HRs. The stakes don't get bigger. #TexasSoftball #Sooners

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Friday night. Austin. ESPN2. 6 PM CT.

Texas vs. Oklahoma in the Red River Rivalry.

Kendall Wells. 30 home runs. One from the all-time NCAA freshman record. Do not miss this. #Sooners #TexasSoftball

article.headline: Red River Rivalry Preview: Texas vs. Oklahoma Has Everything — And It's Three Days Away

stories.title: Kendall Wells — No Games, No Problem. The Stage Is Ready (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells is still at 30 home runs. No games for OU this week.

She's tied for the NCAA freshman record — and the Red River Rivalry at Texas is next.

If she breaks it on ESPN, it'll be one of the moments of the year. #Sooners

article.headline: Kendall Wells Is Still at 30. The Stage Is Ready. She Just Has to Swing.

stories.title: FSU's 24-Game Streak Heads West — Seminoles Travel to Face Stanford (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
FSU hasn't lost since February.

The Seminoles are 35-4 with a 24-game win streak — and they're heading to California to face No. 24 Stanford this week.

Can the streak reach 27? #FSUSoftball #ACCSoftball

article.headline: FSU's 24-Game Win Streak Heads West: The Seminoles Face Stanford This Weekend

stories.title: Softball America Week 10 — Full Rankings Breakdown and Who's Moving (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Nebraska jumps to No. 5. North Alabama debuts at No. 18. Kansas, Louisville, and SE Louisiana are in.

Softball America Week 10 is out and the top 25 looks different from top to bottom.

Alabama is No. 1. #CFASoftball

stories.title: North Alabama Makes the Polls — Mid-Major Finally Gets National Recognition (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
North Alabama is in the Softball America Top 25 for the first time.

UNA is 27-8 and leading the Atlantic Sun. No. 18 nationally.

Mid-major programs building something real. #UNASoftball
